title: i18n keys for cli.uninstall.* in en and zh-CN locales
description: Add the full `cli.uninstall.*` key family to both `packages/shared/src/i18n/locales/en.ts` and `packages/shared/src/i18n/locales/zh-CN.ts`, mirroring the structure of the existing `cli.init.*` family. Required keys: description, args.*.description (one per flag: target, debug, force, yes, plan, bootstrap, mcp, scaffold, interactive, purge, clean-empties — plus negativeDescription for boolean flags), errors.*, plan.*, stages.*, confirm.prompt, summary.*, wizard.intro, wizard.review. Respect `packages/shared/src/i18n/protected-tokens.ts` — every reference to `.fabric/`, `.fabric/knowledge/`, `.fabric/events.jsonl`, `.fabric/agents.meta.json`, `~/.fabric/knowledge/`, `AGENTS.md`, `CLAUDE.md`, `.cursor/rules` MUST use the exact registered token strings. Ensure parity: every key present in en.ts is present in zh-CN.ts with the same shape.

files.target: cli.uninstall.* key family — new addition adjacent to cli.init.*
files.change: Add cli.uninstall key tree with same nesting depth as cli.init: description, args (target.description, debug.description, force.description, yes.description, plan.description, bootstrap.description, bootstrap.negativeDescription, mcp.description, mcp.negativeDescription, scaffold.description, scaffold.negativeDescription, interactive.description, purge.description, clean-empties.description), errors (target-missing, no-fabric-found, lock-held), plan (header, summary), stages (scaffold.header, scaffold.removed, scaffold.skipped, bootstrap.header, mcp.header), confirm.prompt, summary (removed, skipped, errors), wizard (intro, review). Voice: command-line, terse, matches cli.init.* tone.

Add cli.uninstall tree with identical structure to en.ts. Chinese voice matches cli.init.* (concise, e.g., cli.uninstall.description = '从目标项目中卸载 Fabric。'). Protected tokens (.fabric/, AGENTS.md, etc.) appear VERBATIM unmodified per protected-tokens.ts registry.

implementation: Read packages/shared/src/i18n/locales/en.ts to identify the cli.init.* block boundaries; replicate the structure as cli.uninstall.* placed alphabetically adjacent or symmetric.
Read packages/shared/src/i18n/locales/zh-CN.ts and packages/shared/src/i18n/protected-tokens.ts. Confirm every protected token string is preserved exactly (no translation/paraphrasing) in zh-CN.

Author en.ts cli.uninstall.* entries. For each flag from TASK-002's args block, write a one-line description: e.g., cli.uninstall.args.target.description = 'Project root to uninstall Fabric from (default: cwd)'; cli.uninstall.args.purge.description = 'Also remove .fabric/knowledge/ and state files (events.jsonl, agents.meta.json, forensic.json). Personal-root ~/.fabric/knowledge/ is never touched.'; cli.uninstall.args.clean-empties.description = 'When un-merging hook configs, cascade-remove empty arrays/objects.'.
Author zh-CN.ts mirror: same structure, Chinese strings. Protected tokens unchanged.

Add cli.uninstall.errors.no-fabric-found ('Fabric not found in {{target}}; nothing to uninstall.' / '在 {{target}} 中未找到 Fabric；无可卸载。'), cli.uninstall.errors.lock-held ('A serve process holds the lock at {{path}}. Use --force to override.' / similar zh).

Add cli.uninstall.plan.header ('Fabric uninstall dry run'), cli.uninstall.summary.{removed,skipped,errors} (with {{count}} placeholder), cli.uninstall.confirm.prompt ('Proceed with removal? This will delete N artifacts.' — with {{count}}).
Add cli.uninstall.wizard.intro, cli.uninstall.wizard.review (used by TASK-002's wizard adapter).
Run `pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-shared build` (or test) to confirm TypeScript types pass.
Run `pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli lint:protected-tokens` (or equivalent script) — confirm zero violations: protected paths appear verbatim in all new strings.

reference.pattern: Mirror cli.init.* key family: parallel structure for parallel commands; each flag gets a `.args.<flag>.description` key.
reference.examples: en.ts cli.init.description = 'Initialize Fabric in the target project.' → cli.uninstall.description = 'Uninstall Fabric from the target project.'. zh-CN.ts cli.init.description = '在目标项目中初始化 Fabric。' → cli.uninstall.description = '从目标项目中卸载 Fabric。'.

criteria: Every cli.uninstall.* key present in packages/shared/src/i18n/locales/en.ts also present in packages/shared/src/i18n/locales/zh-CN.ts (verified via a Node one-liner: parse both default-exported objects, dot-walk to cli.uninstall, compare key sets — must be equal).
Every flag declared in TASK-002 uninstallCommand.args has a corresponding cli.uninstall.args.<flag>.description key in both locales (verified by enumerating TASK-002's args block).
Every boolean flag with negativeDescription (bootstrap, mcp, scaffold) has both .description and .negativeDescription keys in both locales.
`pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli lint:protected-tokens` (or equivalent CI command) exits 0 — zero protected-token violations in the new strings.
Loading the locale tables via `import en from '.../en.ts'; en.cli.uninstall.description` returns a non-undefined non-empty string in both locales.

rationale.chosen_approach: Eager full key coverage in both locales BEFORE the i18n.test.ts snapshot is wired (TASK-005), so the snapshot regeneration runs cleanly. Mirror cli.init.* family structure for predictability.
alternatives_considered: Defer zh-CN translations and ship en-only initially — rejected: zh-CN is the project's primary locale (per project memory), users would see raw key strings
Auto-translate via tool — rejected: command-line voice requires human-tuned terseness
decision_factors: i18n parity is a CI hard gate (i18n.test.ts.snap)
Protected-tokens lint is a CI hard gate
rationale.tradeoffs: Translation latency during this task vs blocking TASK-005; mitigated by depending on TASK-002+TASK-003 having stabilized the flag/string surface first.

manual_checks: Open packages/shared/src/i18n/locales/en.ts and zh-CN.ts; visually confirm cli.uninstall tree is structurally identical
Confirm no '.fabric' paraphrased to 'fabric directory' or similar in any new string
success_metrics: Key parity en/zh-CN: 100% — zero missing keys in either direction
FAB_LANG=zh-CN node -e "import('./packages/cli/src/commands/uninstall.ts').then(m => console.log(m.default.meta.description))" prints the Chinese description
